directives:
**D1**: Technical Operations — Conduct emergency audit of X Council data collection pipeline. Identify root cause of 85% failure rate. Report findings within 48 hours. (Measurable: Restore >70% data collection rate)

**D2**: Intelligence Team — Establish YouTube Council connection and produce missing intelligence synthesis within 24 hours. (Measurable: Deliver YouTube signal analysis for 2026-05-20 period)

**D3**: Market Analysis — Monitor BlackRock BTC ETF flows and SEC ETH ETF decisions for next 72 hours. Flag any >$300M daily moves or regulatory announcements. (Measurable: Hourly flow monitoring reports)

**D4**: Risk Management — Track Middle East escalation signals and crypto market correlation patterns. Alert if crypto drops >5% concurrent with geopolitical news. (Measurable: Automated correlation monitoring)

**D5**: Operations Security — Implement redundant data collection across alternative X monitoring methods within 7 days. (Measurable: Backup system operational with independent data stream)
